_comment: Plugin-mode hooks (loaded by Claude Code plugin runtime). Uses ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} — a plugin runtime variable that resolves to the plugin's install cache directory. For Go installer mode, use hooks/config.json instead (uses ~/.claude/hooks/ paths). Policy gate (PreToolUse Bash|Write|Edit|NotebookEdit) fires on every write/exec tool; reasoning-checkpoint guard (PreToolUse Task) gates phase dispatch; notification (Notification) fires only on idle_prompt.
